message:
feat(daemon): support hot-reload without bouncing VMs

- Add KillMode=process to systemd service to only kill the daemon
  process, not child Firecracker VMs
- Add reconcileRunningVMs() to check PID files on startup and update
  task status for VMs that died while daemon was stopped
- VMs now survive daemon restarts and maintain their running status

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,10 @@ ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/stockyardd
 Restart=on-failure
 RestartSec=5
 
+# Only kill the daemon process, not child VMs
+# This allows VMs to survive daemon restarts
+KillMode=process
+
 # Runtime directory for socket
 RuntimeDirectory=stockyard
 RuntimeDirectoryMode=0755
